calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Awards
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. EZEKIEL D. CARDER OF WEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD, TEL. NO. (510) 337-1001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Awards is Granted, no opposition filed. The Court will award reasonable attorney fees of $1500 and costs of $540. The total amount due and owing is thus $176,583.40. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)
